zh: 耐心聽完孩子的敘述、抱怨、投訴、
en: Listen patiently to your child's story, complaint, or grievance,

zh: 即使孩子的用詞偏激或急切、
en: even when their words are sharp or urgent.

zh: 我們當父母的都不先批評自己的孩子、
en: As parents, we must not criticize them first,

zh: 要以很關切的態度來聆聽、
進而深入了解孩子的真意。
en: and then truly understand what they really mean.
